questions.question: What is the biggest limitation of HubSpot Free for solo founders?
questions.explanation: HubSpot Free limits you to 1 pipeline, which means you can't separate inbound and outbound deals. Contact limits are unlimited on the free tier.

questions.question: Which CRM automatically enriches contacts from LinkedIn and public data?
questions.explanation: Attio Plus auto-enriches contacts from LinkedIn, company websites, and social profiles. HubSpot requires manual enrichment or third-party tools like Apollo.

questions.question: A B2B founder sends 200 cold emails per week and needs Stripe + Slack integrations. Which CRM fits best?
questions.explanation: HubSpot Starter ($20/mo) provides automation for follow-ups, 2 pipelines for inbound/outbound separation, and native Stripe + Slack integrations. Attio would require Zapier for some integrations.

questions.question: Attio's AI-readiness score is higher than HubSpot's because of its flexible data model and native AI features.
questions.explanation: Attio scores 9/10 for AI-readiness due to custom objects, flexible schema, and baked-in AI features. HubSpot scores 7/10 with a more rigid schema.

questions.question: What is the 12-month cost difference between HubSpot Starter and Attio Plus?
questions.explanation: HubSpot Starter costs $240/year ($20/mo). Attio Plus costs $348/year ($29/mo). The difference is $108 annually, with Attio being more expensive.
